tasks.title: LAB I — Ruxsatlarni o'qish va o'zgartirish
tasks.desc: test.txt + run.sh yarat, chmod 600/644/+x bilan o'yna. 6-qadam nega Permission denied bo'ldi?

tasks.title: LAB II — Egalik va sudo
tasks.desc: sudo touch, chown bilan egalikni o'zgartir, id bilan o'z guruhlaringni ko'r.

tasks.title: BOSS — 'Qulflangan Ruxsatlar' (chmod+r → +x → sudo)
tasks.desc: cd ~/devops/days/day-02/quest && cat START.txt — 4 bosqichni yech, flagni top.

tasks.title: SECRET — yashirin ruxsatli fayl
tasks.desc: find ~/devops -name '.*' -type f bilan yangi yashirin faylni top, SECRET{...} ni ustozga ayt.

tasks.title: 🐍 Python Drop — list & dict
tasks.desc: labs/day-02/day02.py: serverlar list + status dict, faqat 'running' larni chiqar.

tasks.title: 🇬🇧 English Drop
tasks.desc: 5 so'z (permission, owner, execute, grant, deny) + 2 jumla inglizcha.

tasks.title: 💻 Shell Drill — find + chmod
tasks.desc: ~/devops dagi barcha .sh fayllarni bir buyruqda executable qil (find -exec).

tasks.title: Tushuntirib ber
tasks.desc: chmod 755 va 644 farqini + 'ega bo'lsam ham nega 000 ni o'qiy olmadim' ni ustozga ayt.
